name: gps-plus-slam-anchor-starter
description: Starter example consuming gps-plus-slam-app-framework: place a single GPS anchor, encode it into the page URL (?show=), reload, re-localise and re-display it at the exact physical spot — and share the link to open the same anchor on another device. The 'meaningful minimal' rung between the trivial minimal example and the full recorder app.

scripts.test: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:core: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint && pnpm run lint:css && pnpm run check:all && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:tests && pnpm run test:unit
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build:framework && playwright test --config playwright-tests/playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:headed: pnpm run build:framework && playwright test --config playwright-tests/playwright.config.js --headed
scripts.test:e2e:ui: pnpm run build:framework && playwright test --config playwright-tests/playwright.config.js --ui
scripts.check:all: pnpm run check:dup && pnpm run check:cycles && pnpm run check:boundaries && pnpm run check:deadcode
